Enlarged Meniscus.effect: Fall damage hits stamina before HP

Reabsorption.effect: Recover thirst from rain or freshwater swimming

Cannibalistic.effect: Own species counts as preferred prey (Slot 2/4)

Barometric Sensitivity.effect: Warning before incoming storms or droughts

Hypervigilance.effect: Wider camera while eating/drinking; +50% footstep audio

Truculency.effect: +5% chance to dislodge grabbed animals with buck

Advanced Gestation.effect: Gestation, incubation and egg cooldown 50% faster

Hypermetabolic Inanition.effect: The hungrier you are, the more damage you deal (carnivore, Slot 2)

Tactile Endurance.effect: Damage taken converts to stamina (herbivore, Slot 2)

Traumatic Thrombosis.effect: Prevents death from blood loss while resting (Slot 2)

Augmented Tapetum.effect: Enhanced night vision. Unlock: kill 5 players at night (carnivore)

Enhanced Digestion.effect: Reduced nutrient decay rate. Unlock: maintain nutrients for 60 min

Heightened Ghrelin.effect: Greatly increases overfeeding capacity. Unlock: keep hunger >80% for 30 min

Multichambered Lungs.effect: Increased stamina regen threshold. Unlock: drain 4,500 stamina sprinting/swimming

Osteophagic.effect: Eat bones to accelerate fracture recovery. Unlock: eat bones with a broken bone (carnivore)

Parthenogenesis.effect: Nest without a partner, not inherited. Slot 2 (females)

Prolific Reproduction.effect: Offspring have more HP, faster stamina regen, need less food, grow faster. Slot 2 (females)

Reinforced Tendons.effect: Jumping costs less stamina. Unlock: jump 50 times

Reniculate Kidneys.effect: Allows drinking saltwater (1,000 thirst reserve). Unlock: lose 1,250 thirst from saltwater
